milestone: Phase 2 — Milestone 2: Canonical Evidence Unit Runtime
summary: Evidence Unit v1.1 frozen as canonical Layer 2 assessment object. No further schema fields without construct-validity review. First inferential leap deferred to M3 Behaviour Engine.
assessment_object_definition: The smallest traceable assessment object representing an interpretable piece of learner evidence while preserving provenance, uncertainty, source quality, and review metadata.
modification_policy: No Evidence Unit fields without construct-validity justification. OCR is upstream adapter only.
